Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.Model.ModelBuilder

  • Packages that use Model.ModelBuilder 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
    Provides domain classes representing objects of the Gemini API.

    • Uses of Model.ModelBuilder in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain that return Model.ModelBuilder 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static Model.ModelBuilder Model.builder()  
      Model.ModelBuilder Model.toBuilder()  
      Model.ModelBuilder Model.ModelBuilder.withBaseModelId​(String baseModelId)
      Required.
      Model.ModelBuilder Model.ModelBuilder.withDescription​(String description)
      A short description of the model.
      Model.ModelBuilder Model.ModelBuilder.withDisplayName​(String displayName)
      The human-readable name of the model.
      Model.ModelBuilder Model.ModelBuilder.withInputTokenLimit​(Integer inputTokenLimit)
      Maximum number of input tokens allowed for this model.
      Model.ModelBuilder Model.ModelBuilder.withMaxTemperature​(Double maxTemperature)
      Max value supported by model.
      Model.ModelBuilder Model.ModelBuilder.withName​(String name)
      Required.
      Model.ModelBuilder Model.ModelBuilder.withOutputTokenLimit​(Integer outputTokenLimit)
      Maximum number of output tokens available for this model.
      Model.ModelBuilder Model.ModelBuilder.withSupportedGenerationMethods​(List<String> supportedGenerationMethods)
      The model's supported generation methods.
      Model.ModelBuilder Model.ModelBuilder.withTemperature​(Double temperature)
      Controls the randomness of the output.
      Model.ModelBuilder Model.ModelBuilder.withTopK​(Integer topK)
      For Top-k sampling.
      Model.ModelBuilder Model.ModelBuilder.withTopP​(Double topP)
      For Nucleus sampling.
      Model.ModelBuilder Model.ModelBuilder.withVersion​(String version)
      Required.
